apiName._comment: Name of the API in APIM that exposes the chat-completions operation. Use 'inference' to match the convention used by the byom-cross-region extension under 16-private-network-standard-agent-apim-setup/extensions/.

connectionName._comment: This name appears in the Foundry portal AI Gateway picker and as the prefix in agents: '<connectionName>/<deploymentName>'.

authType._comment: ProjectManagedIdentity makes Foundry use the project's managed identity to obtain a token, and APIM validates it with validate-azure-ad-token.

deploymentInPath._comment: true if APIM exposes /deployments/{deploymentName}/chat/completions (Azure OpenAI style). Use 'true' when the urlTemplate on the APIM operation includes {deploymentName}.

staticModels._comment: Models registered on the backend (e.g. a Foundry account in another region). Each entry surfaces in the Foundry portal as '<connectionName>/<name>'.
